creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 201688
Patch file generated with svn diff

Hi all,

The option Protocol is now obsolete.

The value of Protocol in ssh_config has indeed been changed from 2,1 to 2 but that option was deleted thereafter, when support of SSH protocol version 1 was eventually dropped.

No functional change (obsolete option was mentioned in a comment)

References:
• https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable/commit/09d87d79741beb85768b5e788d7dfdf4bc3543dc#diff-f208e23062381f5c3f9230ebbbebb1a4

• https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable/commit/99f95ba82673d33215dce17bfa1512b57f54ec09#diff-42833d59dac20f1a0417b3ada07e9bf6
